title: Ham hocks with Boston beans
description: Slow-cooked ham hocks with white beans, molasses, mustard and spices baked in the oven.
steps: Soak the beans overnight. Drain and cover with stock in a pan. Bring to a boil, skim any scum and simmer for 30 minutes. Pour off some stock, leaving enough to just cover the beans.
Put the molasses, muscovado sugar and mustard powder in a bowl. Add a ladleful of stock from the bean pot and stir until dissolved.
Add the studded onions and star anise to the pot, followed by the molasses mixture. Bury the hocks in the beans, add the peppercorns and bring to a boil.
Cover and cook in the oven for 4 hours.
